projects.title: Projects
projects.fetchingProjects: Fetching your Claude projects and sessions
projects.runClaudeCli: Run Claude CLI in a project directory to get started
projects.selectProjectForFiles: Select a project to browse files
projects.openOnRemoteFailed: Could not open the project on the remote host. Check the server log for [remote-claude-open-project] and [ssh-servers] open-claude-project.
projects.openRemoteByPathHint: Enter an absolute path on the SSH host, browse folders, then open. Does not require a prior ~/.claude/projects entry.
projects.openRemotePathDialogHint: Path must be absolute (e.g. /home/you/repo). Default view is the remote $HOME. Click a folder to go in; use the up control for parent. Then run open on the current folder.
projects.browseLoadError: Could not list this directory. Check the path and SSH access.
projects.openRemotePathMustAbsolute: Path must start with / (absolute on the remote host).
projects.claudeMdRemotePathHint: Uses this project’s directory on the SSH host (no manual path).
projects.claudeMdRemoteBody: Appends a marked block to CLAUDE.md in the project root, or creates the file if missing. You can save reusable snippets as templates below.
projects.openLocalPathDialogHint: Enter a local directory path or browse to it. Once added to the project list, you can manage it in this UI.
projects.openLocalFailed: Could not open this project. Please verify the path exists.

tooltips.openRemoteClaudeProject: Run claudecode / claude in the project directory on the remote (same as local cd + -p). See server log for full output.
tooltips.openRemoteByPath: Open a project by absolute path (browse on remote or paste path)
tooltips.openLocalByPath: Open a local project by path (browse or paste path)
tooltips.openClaudeMdRemote: Append or create CLAUDE.md in this project’s root on the remote host

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
messages.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
messages.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this empty project? This action cannot be undone.
messages.deleteSessionFailed: Failed to delete session. Please try again.
messages.deleteSessionError: Error deleting session. Please try again.
messages.renameSessionFailed: Failed to rename session. Please try again.
messages.renameSessionError: Error renaming session. Please try again.
messages.deleteProjectFailed: Failed to delete project. Please try again.
messages.deleteProjectError: Error deleting project. Please try again.
messages.createProjectFailed: Failed to create project. Please try again.
messages.createProjectError: Error creating project. Please try again.

search.remoteContextBanner: You are in a remote workspace. The project list below is discovered on the SSH host (under ~/.claude/projects). Use Servers to switch back to this machine for local work.
search.remoteContextWithName: Remote workspace ({{name}}). The project list below is from that SSH host.
search.createProjectRemoteDisabled: You cannot create a new local project while a remote workspace is selected. Switch to “this machine” in Servers first.

sshServers.vaultRequired: Set CLOUDCLI_VAULT_KEY on the server (32-byte base64) to store SSH credentials. Restart the server after setting it.
sshServers.groupsHint: Groups ({{count}}): {{names}}. They appear in the “Add server” form below to assign a server to a group.
sshServers.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete this group? Servers in it must be moved or removed first; otherwise this will fail.
sshServers.empty: No SSH servers yet. Add one to test connectivity (P0).
sshServers.formRequired: Fill display name, host, and username.
sshServers.confirmDelete: Delete this SSH server and stored credentials?
sshServers.editSecretsOptionalHint: Leave the key or password empty to keep the stored credentials. After switching auth type, you must provide a new key or password.
sshServers.privateKeyEditPlaceholder: New PEM private key (optional if unchanged)
sshServers.authTypeChangePrivateKeyRequired: After switching to private key, paste a PEM private key.
sshServers.authTypeChangePasswordRequired: After switching to password, enter the new password.
sshServers.claudeInstallNeedSecrets: Save SSH credentials and configure vault before using remote CLI setup.
sshServers.claudeProbeFailed: Failed to probe remote for Claude CLI.
sshServers.claudeAlreadyInstalled: Claude or claudecode is already on PATH: {{path}}
sshServers.claudeInstallDialogHint: The script is loaded over HTTPS from an allowlisted host. You may change the base URL and review the full command; only matching templates are allowed for security. Admin can set CLOUDCLI_REMOTE_INSTALL_BASE_URL and CLOUDCLI_REMOTE_INSTALL_HOST_ALLOW.
sshServers.claudeConfigPathHint: Typical config path after install: under {{path}} (see docs for your login user, not as root by default).
sshServers.claudeInstallCommandLabel: Command to run (editable; must still match a safe template for this base URL)
sshServers.claudeInstallFailed: Remote install failed. See log below or server log.
sshServers.claudeInstallSkipped: Claude or claudecode is already on the remote PATH. Nothing to do.
sshServers.claudeInstallDoneOk: Install finished. Claude CLI is now on the remote PATH. Switch to this environment and open the Projects tab to load lists.
sshServers.claudeInstallExitOkButNotDetected: The install command exited successfully, but a follow-up probe did not see claude/claudecode on PATH. Log in to the host and check PATH, or re-run the probe.
sshServers.selectTemplateFirst: Select a template from the list.
sshServers.mdTemplateNameBody: Enter a template name and some body text.
sshServers.claudeMdApplyOk: CLAUDE.md updated on the remote project path.
sshServers.claudeProviderModalHint: Use the Model and System tabs; each has its own Deploy button. The catalog is shared across servers; checked rows deploy only to this SSH host.
sshServers.claudeProviderApplySystemOk: System settings saved and deployed (IS_SANDBOX and allowed tools for this server).
sshServers.claudeProviderApplySystemErr: System deploy failed. See the step log below.
sshServers.claudeProviderSystemTabHint: IS_SANDBOX is written on the remote via claudecode --env-set. Allowed tool names are stored in this app per server and merged into each remote --allowed-tools with your browser list.
sshServers.claudeProviderSandbox: IS_SANDBOX: when checked, runs claudecode --env-set IS_SANDBOX=1 on the remote; unchecked sets 0.
sshServers.claudeProviderRemoteToolsHint: Same entries as in chat (e.g. Grep, Read, Bash(git:*) ). Merged with browser claude-settings for each remote -p run.
sshServers.claudeProviderRemoteToolsEmpty: No tools yet; type a name above and add.
sshServers.claudeProviderCatalog: Local channel catalog (not on remote until you apply)
sshServers.claudeProviderCatalogHint: Channel id maps to --id; models may be comma-separated; API key is encrypted (CLOUDCLI_VAULT_KEY) and stored only here.
sshServers.claudeProviderKeyOptional: Leave empty to keep existing key
sshServers.claudeProviderKeyRequired: API key is required to create a row.
sshServers.claudeProviderConfirmDelete: Delete this record? It will be removed from this server’s selection too.
sshServers.claudeProviderZenFree: OpenCode Zen: sets CLAUDE_CODE_ZEN_FREE_MODELS=1 and CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=0 to fetch Zen list; when off, Zen=0 and non-essential traffic=1.
sshServers.claudeRemoteListModelsHint: Runs on the remote; depends on its PATH and .env. We parse the Model Picker block.
sshServers.claudeProviderApplyOk: Deploy completed. See command log and env-export below.
sshServers.claudeProviderApplyErr: Deploy failed. See the step log or server output.
sshServers.claudeProviderFormClickToExpand: Click to expand. After a successful add, or Save/Cancel, the form collapses and clears.

deleteConfirmation.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteConfirmation.allConversationsDeleted: All conversations will be permanently deleted.
